subcodes.first_line: The melody of God hath been raised from these precincts wherein the Spirit hath called out: "Here am I! Here am I, O Thou Who art the Object of desire!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفعت نغمه الله من هذا الشطر الذی فیه نادی الروح لبیک لبیک یا مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @nearness and remoteness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
